title: 3 Data Roles with Financial Services
description:
🚀 Hiring: 3 Permanent Data Roles | Leading Global Financial Services Firm (Singapore)

We are partnering with a top-tier global financial institution to hire three permanent roles across the data function, supporting investment, portfolio, and operational teams.

🔹 Open Positions

1️⃣ Business Data Operations
Focus: Reference Data / Master Data

  • Own and manage critical business data across investment and operational platforms

  • Ensure data quality, controls, and governance across asset classes

  • Partner closely with front office, operations, and technology teams

  • Ideal for candidates with strong data operations, reference data, or IBOR exposure

2️⃣ IBOR Data – VP

  • Lead IBOR data processes supporting portfolio valuation, performance, and reporting

  • Drive data accuracy, reconciliation, and downstream consumption

  • Act as a key stakeholder between investment teams, ops, and technology

  • Strong role for candidates with IBOR, fund accounting, or investment data leadership experience

3️⃣ Data Strategy – VP

  • Shape and execute enterprise-level data strategy aligned to investment and portfolio needs

  • Drive data architecture, governance, and analytics enablement

  • Partner with senior stakeholders across investments, risk, and technology

  • Ideal for candidates with experience in data strategy, investment data platforms, or transformation initiatives

📌 What’s on offer

  • Permanent headcount

  • High-visibility roles within a leading institutional environment

  • Strong collaboration with investment and portfolio teams

  • Long-term growth and strategic exposure

📩 Interested or know someone suitable?
Please apply or reach out directly at komal@kstalentsolutions.com

All enquiries handled confidentially.

—

postedCompany.description:
KS Consulting  is a boutique executive search firm that specializes in placing mid to senior level professionals into Infrastructure roles across APAC and the Middle East. We have experience in working successfully with start-ups, local conglomerates, MNC’s, international banks and financial services firms. Since incorporation in 2007, the world has dramatically changed and with that we have evolved in order to meet our clients high expectations. As every market, business and hiring requirement is different, our bespoke service means that we always deliver successfully.

Our team has over thirty years of industry experience and we live strongly by our values of loyalty, integrity and service excellence and strive to ensure that the recruitment process is a seamless journey every time for our partners.

Partnership is key with our clients and candidates alike and our length of time in the market, our industry knowledge, networks, experienced team and boutique service ensures we continue to lead. We help our clients and candidates across the Permanent, Contract and Interim markets

KS CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
postedCompany.name: KS CONSULTING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
